holdings.infoBox: SCEP is an equity ETF with a total of 116 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 5.98%, NVIDIA at 5.81%, Apple at 5.70%, Broadcom at 5.63%, and Amazon.com at 4.65%.

overview.description: The Sterling Capital Hedged Equity Premium Income ETF (SCEP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in US large- and mid-cap equity securities while employing an option overlay strategy on up to 100% of the portfolio. SCEP was launched on Dec 11, 2025 and is issued by Sterling Capital.
